NMD - Allow users to amend individual fields within the storage address without re‑entering the full address


Description

Description:
Users currently have to re‑enter the entire storage address even if they only need to update a single field (e.g., the building number).
This creates unnecessary rework and increases the likelihood of errors.
The system should allow users to edit individual address components while keeping the remaining fields intact.

User Story:
As a user,
I want to be able to amend the storage address (e.g., change the building number),
so that I do not have to re‑enter the entire address.

Acceptance Criteria:

Scenario 1: update part of storage address

Given I have made an error when entering my address

When I want to amended one field of the storage address eg building number

Then I can amend the field without having to enter the entire address

And I must receive confirmation that the change was successful
